name: Bunsen Honeydew
ability: You start knowing how many characters there are in play who can create Humans.
firstNightReminder: Show fingers (0, 1, 2, etc.) equalling the number of characters in play who can create Humans.

name: Rowlf the Dog
ability: You start knowing 2 players who are not townsfolk.
firstNightReminder: Point to two players who are not townsfolk.

name: Pepe the Prawn
ability: You start knowing which demon is in play.

name: Sam the Eagle
ability: Each night you learn how many steps a living evil is from you. [+1 Human]
firstNightReminder: Show fingers equalling the distance to a living evil player.
otherNightReminder: Show fingers equalling the distance to a living evil player.

name: Kermit the Frog
ability: Each night*, choose a player (not yourself): if they are a Human they become a townsfolk.
otherNightReminder: Kermit selects a player. If Human, remove the Human reminder token. If Miss Piggy is in play, a Townsfolk might become Human instead.

name: Camilla the Chicken
ability: Each night*, if a player died by execution today: you learn a player of their alignment.
otherNightReminder: If a player died by execution today, point to a player of the same alignment.

name: Sweetums
ability: Each night*, you learn how many evil players voted.
otherNightReminder: Show fingers equalling the number of evil players who voted today.

name: Swedish Chef
ability: Each night*, you learn if there are more or less Humans than last night. If you were non-verbal on the 1st day, you instead learn how many Humans are in play.
otherNightReminder: If verbal day 1: thumbs up/down/sideways. If non-verbal day 1: show finger count of Humans.

name: The Great Gonzo
ability: Each night*, you may choose a player: if you choose a minion they die, if you choose a townsfolk you die.
otherNightReminder: Gonzo may choose a player. If minion, they die. If townsfolk, Gonzo dies. If outsider or demon, nothing happens.

name: Rizzo the Rat
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they are killed by the demon tonight, you learn an alive character.
otherNightReminder: Rizzo chooses a player. If that player is killed by the demon tonight, wake Rizzo and show an alive in-play character token.

name: Fozzie Bear
ability: Each day, you may make a public joke. Waka Waka! Tonight, you learn if it was true.
otherNightReminder: If Fozzie made a public joke today, nod if true, shake head if false.

name: Dr. Teeth
ability: If you are killed by the demon, a Human becomes a Townsfolk, you learn who.
otherNightReminder: If Dr. Teeth was killed by the demon, choose a Human to become the Townsfolk they believed they were. Point to that player. If no Humans, shake head no.

name: Beaker
ability: If you were non-verbal on the 1st day, that night you learn the characters of players who were non-verbal (up to 4) +1 character which is not in play.
firstNightReminder: If Beaker was non-verbal, show up to 4 character tokens of non-verbal players plus 1 not-in-play character.

name: Long John Silver
ability: Each night*, one player who voted on you that day might die, even if you are dead.
otherNightReminder: If Long John Silver was nominated today, you may kill one player who voted on them.

name: Scrooge
ability: At night, if a player chooses another player, they might target you instead.

name: Cameraman
ability: If you communicate verbally on the 1st day, a Townsfolk might become Human immediately.

name: Human
ability: You do not know you are a Human. You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not.
otherNightReminder: Treat them as if they were the character they think they are, but give false information if you wish.

name: Crazy Harry
ability: Each night*, choose a player, the first Outsider you choose becomes evil. [+1 Outsider]
otherNightReminder: Crazy Harry selects a player. If this is the first Outsider selected, wake them to inform them they are now evil.

name: Scooter
ability: Once per day, you may choose to take one player off the block. If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.

name: Constantine
ability: Each night* you may choose 2 players (not the demon), they swap characters, abilities do not refresh. You may register as good, and as Kermit The Frog, even if dead.
otherNightReminder: Constantine may select two players (not the demon). Swap their characters. Wake each to show their new character.

name: Animal
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: they die. If you were non-verbal on the 1st day, 1 of their Townsfolk neighbours becomes Human.
otherNightReminder: If Animal has not used their ability: Animal may choose a player who dies. If non-verbal day 1, one Townsfolk neighbour becomes Human.

name: Miss Piggy
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk chosen by Kermit The Frog might become Human instead. [+ Kermit The Frog]
otherNightReminder: Miss Piggy chooses a player. That player dies.

name: Uncle Deadly
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk who nominate you become Human.
otherNightReminder: Uncle Deadly chooses a player. That player dies.

name: Statler
ability: Each night*, wake with Waldorf, together choose one player: they die. [+ Waldorf, -1 minion]
otherNightReminder: Wake Statler and Waldorf together. They must agree on a player. That player dies.

name: Waldorf
ability: Each night*, wake with Statler, together choose one player: they die. [+ Statler]
otherNightReminder: Wake Statler and Waldorf together. They must agree on a player. That player dies.

name: Am I Man or Muppet?
ability: If a Townsfolk is turned into a Human they are not told of the change. If a Human is turned into a Townsfolk they are not told and become the Townsfolk they believe themselves to be.

name: Non-Verbal
ability: Communicating without real words. Gestures, noises, and pointing (and names when online) all count as non-verbal.
